title: Mohanpur Jagannath temple
tagline: Mohanpur Jagannath temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: The Temples of Bishnupur are a group of temples located in the town of Bishnupur, West Bengal, India.
overview.description: The Temples of Bishnupur are a group of temples located in the town of Bishnupur, West Bengal, India. These temples, built by the Malla kings between the 17th and 18th centuries, are renowned for their unique architectural style that blends traditional Bengali design with influences from other regions. The temples are primarily constructed using terracotta, a material that gives them a distinctive reddish hue and allows for intricate detailing in the artwork. topPlaces.name: Mohanpur (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Mohanpur is a community development block that forms an administrative division in the Kharagpur subdivision of Paschim Medinipur district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Panchrol
topPlaces.description: Panchrol (পাঁচরোল)is a village and a gram panchayat in the Egra I CD block in the Egra subdivision of the Purba Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Raghunatha Temple, Alangiri
topPlaces.description: Raghunath Temple is located at the village of Alangiri near the town of Egra. This temple was established in 1810 by the Das family.

topPlaces.name: Dantan II

topPlaces.name: Shipur
topPlaces.description: Shipur is a fast growing village under Egra I community development block of Purba Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India. Famous for its annual Charak, this village has well-developed social facilities like schools, post office, market, co-operative society, telecommunication, ATM, playground, children's park etc.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mohanpur Jagannath temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mohanpur Jagannath temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mohanpur Jagannath temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (138 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (125 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mohanpur Jagannath temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mohanpur Jagannath temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mohanpur Jagannath temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mohanpur Jagannath temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mohanpur Jagannath temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mohanpur (community development block), Mohanpur, Paschim Medinipur, Panchrol, Raghunatha Temple, Alangiri, Alangiri.
